title: Daemon-only migration application (agents generate, daemon applies)

steps.description: Alembic migration + ORM model for pending_migration_log (append-only audit table for the 3-phase migration pipeline). Reversible.
orch/db/safe_migrate.py library: AgentContextForbidden guard, list_pending_revisions, dry_run (testcontainer), apply (live DB), rollback, multi-head detection, pending_migration_log writer.

Daemon merge-queue integration: 3-phase pipeline (pre-merge dry-run, post-merge apply, on-fail rollback), MIGRATION_INVALID / MIGRATION_ROLLED_BACK batch states, merge_queue_frozen flag via daemon_events, IW_CORE_AGENT_CONTEXT=true in agent subprocess env.
iw migrations {list-pending|dry-run|apply} and iw merge-queue {status|unfreeze} CLI. Operator-ack flag + IW_CORE_AGENT_CONTEXT refusal. Canonical exit codes.

Rewrite Database-step prompt patterns (all 11 templates). Extend docs/IW_AI_Core_Agent_Constraints.md with R2 (Migrations). Update CLAUDE.md files, IW_AI_Core_Migration_Checklist.md, IW_AI_Core_Tech_Stack.md, docs/reference/03_merge_fix_automation.md. Grep stale agent-facing references.
Unit + integration tests. Extend CR-00016's coverage test for the new R2 marker. Integration tests for 3-phase pipeline, frozen queue, multi-head, agent-env guard.
Final cross-layer review. AC1-AC10 coverage, rollback sanity, CR-00014/15/16 compatibility, no stale alembic-upgrade references in agent-facing content.
